task_completion.description: Agent accessed runway information for KOAK airport
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser or aviation app displaying runway details (such as headings, lengths, or airport diagrams) for KOAK / Oakland International Airport.
Screenshots show a text editor open with the file being saved as 'runway_report.txt' (ideally in the /sdcard/ directory).

task_completion.description: Line 1 contains the best runway designation
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor shows '30' (or acceptable alternatives '28R', '28L') on the first line of the file.

task_completion.description: Line 2 contains the correct runway length
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor shows '10520' (or a number between 10000 and 11000) on the second line of the file.

task_completion.description: Line 3 contains the total number of physical runways
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor shows '4' (or '3') on the third line of the file.

integrity.description: Agent actively searched for the airport data rather than using pre-trained knowledge
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent using a search engine, browser, or aviation app to look up KOAK runway information before writing the report.

integrity.description: Agent used a GUI text editor to create the report
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a graphical text editing application being used to write the file, rather than terminal commands like 'echo' or 'cat'.

integrity.description: Agent extracted specific answers rather than copying the prompt
integrity.visual_evidence: The text file contains only the three requested lines of specific data, not a copy-paste of the task instructions or prompt text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: KOAK (Oakland International Airport) has 4 active runways. The optimal runway for a 310° wind is runway '30' (acceptable alternatives: '28R', '28L'). The length of runway 30 is exactly 10,520 feet (accept any value between 10,020 and 11,020 feet due to tolerance). The total number of physical runways is 4 (accept 3 or 4). The output file must be saved as /sdcard/runway_report.txt.
